response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems with limited exposure to C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, or capital markets/fixed-income systems. Their C++ experience is minimal (early roles in C/C++ but not professional C++), and there is no demonstrated domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking. Their strengths lie in modern web technologies and scripting, which do not align closely with the role's core requirements.
strengths: Strong background in full-stack development with modern languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js)
Experience with CI/CD, DevOps practices, and performance optimization in high-throughput systems
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains quickly
concerns: Lacks significant professional C++ development experience (especially on Windows platform)
No direct experience with SQL Server/Oracle or capital markets/fixed-income systems
Domain expertise does not align with the required financial services or fixed-income derivatives knowledge

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets
